title: coleus arenicola
intro: Coleus arenicola, also known as the sand coleus, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family and is native to India and Sri Lanka. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids in its leaves. The health benefits of Coleus arenicola include relief from fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a topical treatment for wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Coleus arenicola include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
